lemon_market_new_listings.description: Looking for a dependable vehicle that won't break the bank? This car has been well-loved and shows some typical wear and tear, placing it in fair condition, but it still runs with plenty of spirit! It’s a fantastic, budget-friendly choice for someone who values character and reliability over a showroom finish.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show visible signs of wear and some cosmetic damage. All mechanical systems are operational, though the car would benefit from routine maintenance.
The vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All major systems are functional and the vehicle is well-maintained.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be safely returned to the road. The engine currently struggles to stay running, and the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping between gears. Externally, there is extensive rust damage on the rocker panels and wheel arches, along with several large dents and peeling clear coat. The interior has seen better days, with torn upholstery and non-functional air conditioning. This car is being sold as-is and is ideally suited as a parts car or a major project for a dedicated mechanic.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior paint has some fading on the roof and hood, along with several visible scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger side. Inside, the upholstery shows significant wear, and the interior trim has a few cracks. While the car is currently functional and runs, it will likely need some mechanical attention soon to ensure long-term reliability. This is an honest representation of a well-used car that remains a practical option for a budget-conscious buyer.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this unit delivers a superior driving experience and exceptional long-term value. We invite you to experience the reliability and sophistication that define this standout example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! 👋 I'm selling my trusty car, and it's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it's ready to hit the road with its next owner right away. It runs beautifully and is super dependable—perfect for anyone looking for a reliable ride that still looks great. I'd love for you to come take it for a test drive and see for yourself!

Offering a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 and a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. This example has been meticulously serviced with documented rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators to address common platform vulnerabilities. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by the M Variable Differential Lock and Electronic Damper Control (EDC), providing exceptional lateral grip and communicative feedback. The exterior maintains a clean profile with minor road-going wear, while the interior features well-preserved Novillo leather. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive subframe inspection and a fresh fluid service, ensuring this driver-spec machine is ready for the canyon roads.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minimal wear. Sold as is.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of performance and comfort, making it an ideal choice for a discerning driver. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use typical of a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery is supple with no rips or tears, and all electronic features—including the infotainment system and climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, characterized by smooth gear transitions, responsive braking, and a quiet, composed engine. It has been garage-kept and serviced at regular intervals, with a complete maintenance log available for review. This is a reliable, high-quality vehicle that has been cared for with pride and is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a robust service history, it offers a refined balance of sophisticated performance and long-term dependability. Our rigorous inspection process ensures that every system operates with precision, presenting a vehicle that is as reliable as it is aesthetically composed. This offering is a testament to quality engineering, perfectly suited for those who demand excellence and value in equal measure.

This exceptional vehicle stands as a testament to diligent ownership and mechanical integrity. Presenting in commendable condition, it offers a sophisticated driving experience backed by a history of consistent maintenance. An ideal acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking premium performance and enduring value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for its next owner! I’ve made sure to take great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road for your next adventure today. You’re going to love how smooth it feels—come check it out!

Good condition. Clean title. Service records included. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Step inside to a pristine, non-smoker cabin where the premium materials have been preserved with care; the seats remain supportive and the dashboard is free of any sun damage or cracks. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the responsive infotainment system, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, backed by a comprehensive service history that ensures peace of mind. With excellent tire tread remaining and a firm, quiet suspension, this car delivers a refined driving experience that reflects years of responsible ownership. It is a complete, turn-key package for a buyer who values both performance and lasting quality.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. This specimen represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and reliability. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, it stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly in such great shape! It drives smoothly, looks fantastic, and is just waiting for someone new to take it on its next big adventure. You’re going to love how it feels on the road—come take a look!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. All systems functional. Minor cosmetic wear.

Presenting a meticulously maintained premium sedan that strikes the perfect balance between executive luxury and spirited performance. This vehicle has been garage-kept and treated with the utmost care, showing a vibrant exterior finish that retains its original deep luster. The interior is a sanctuary of comfort, featuring supple leather seating surfaces that remain in excellent shape, a smoke-free environment, and a suite of fully operational high-tech amenities including a premium surround-sound system and intuitive navigation. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance and recent service updates. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. While it shows the minor, honest signs of careful use consistent with its history, it remains a standout example of its model year. This is a turnkey vehicle, ready for its next owner to enjoy a refined driving experience without compromise.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, the automobile has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, balancing long-term durability with refined comfort.

This vehicle represents a remarkable opportunity for the discerning motorist, offering a synthesis of mechanical reliability and refined aesthetics. Meticulously maintained throughout its tenure, the car exhibits consistent performance characteristics and a well-preserved interior. Having successfully undergone our comprehensive diagnostic evaluation, this unit stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains prepared for immediate, long-term service. It is a premier selection for those who demand quality without compromise.

Hey there! 👋 I'm looking to find a new home for this absolute beauty! It’s been so reliable and is in wonderful shape, just waiting for someone to take it on its next big adventure. It runs like a dream and has been super well-maintained over the years. You’re going to absolutely love driving this around! ✨

This E46 M3 is a mechanically stout example of the S54-powered icon, featuring the high-revving 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a 6-speed manual transmission. The drivetrain delivers linear power with a reinforced rear subframe and a recently serviced VANOS system ensuring optimal cam timing. Suspension geometry remains precise with refreshed control arm bushings and a limited-slip variable M differential providing exceptional corner-exit traction. While showing light cosmetic patina, the vehicle’s structural integrity and powertrain response are sharp, making it a formidable driver’s car for those prioritizing analog feedback and engineering purity.
Used sedan. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Interior shows light wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of reliability and sophisticated style. The exterior presents beautifully with a deep gloss, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment featuring supple leather seating, an intuitive infotainment system, and dual-zone climate control that functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has a complete service history, with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of premium tires. The engine delivers smooth, responsive power, while the suspension remains tight and composed. It is a turn-key example ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who values mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, the unit exhibits a consistent service history and remains in a highly commendable state of repair. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, this automobile delivers a sophisticated driving experience that aligns with the highest standards of its class. We invite you to experience the enduring quality and reliable performance of this exceptional offering.
